testcase.name: testEncontrarTarefaDoDataSet
testcase.system-out: --- Executando testEncontrarTarefaDoDataSet --- [EL Fine]: sql: 2025-11-11 15:20:33.057--ServerSession(501036152)--Connection(1884387196)--Thread(Thread[main,5,main])--SELECT ID, FLG_CONCLUIDA, DT_CONCLUSAO, DT_INICIO, DT_PREVISAO, TXT_DESCRICAO, ID_FUNCIONARIO FROM TB_TAREFA WHERE (ID = ?) bind => [501] [EL Fine]: sql: 2025-11-11 15:20:33.057--ServerSession(501036152)--Connection(1884387196)--Thread(Thread[main,5,main])--SELECT ID, TXT_CEP, TXT_ENDERECO, TXT_NOME FROM TB_PADARIA WHERE (ID = ?) bind => [101] Encontrada: 'Checar estoque de farinha' para o func. João Silva
